mechanism_narrative: When RSAFS has a positive 3-month growth trend, household demand momentum supports near-term revenue expectations and produces positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:positive 20-day SPX forward returns were 65.5% of sessions in the 2005-2024 target panel
failure_condition: Reject if positive 3-month RSAFS growth is followed by positive 20-day SPX returns in no more than the unconditional baseline rate, or if its rolling 3-year Rank IC is below 0.03.

mechanism_narrative: When FEDFUNDS crosses above 4.0%, restrictive policy raises the discount rate on equity cash flows and tightens financial conditions, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations have positive 20-day SPX returns in more than 60% of cases and mean triggered returns are not below non-triggered returns at p <= 0.05.

mechanism_narrative: A rise in UNRATE of more than 0.3 percentage point over 3 months signals labor-market deterioration and recession-risk repricing, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if triggered instances have average 60-day SPX returns greater than or equal to non-triggered instances, or if the negative hit rate is below 45% over walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: When INDPRO rises over both 1-month and 3-month windows, improving production momentum signals stronger operating leverage and earnings revisions, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if the triggered signal has a 20-day forward return Rank IC below 0.03 in two consecutive 3-year rolling windows or if mean triggered returns are not positive.

mechanism_narrative: When HOUST falls more than 10% below its trailing 12-month average, residential investment weakness leads broader demand and credit stress, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations produce positive 60-day SPX returns in more than 60% of cases or if drawdown frequency is not higher than the unconditional sample.

mechanism_narrative: When CPIAUCSL 3-month inflation decelerates while PAYEMS continues to rise, disinflation without job loss supports a soft-landing repricing and produces positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 3-month annualized change falls versus prior 3 months and PAYEMS 3-month change > 0
failure_condition: Reject if the joint signal does not outperform either CPIAUCSL-only or PAYEMS-only signals by at least 25 bps in average 20-day return in walk-forward testing.

mechanism_narrative: When PAYEMS rises rapidly while UNRATE is below 4.5% and FEDFUNDS is above 4.0%, tight labor demand sustains wage and inflation pressure, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations have positive 5-day SPX returns in more than 58% of cases or if the interaction term adds no explanatory power beyond PAYEMS, UNRATE, and FEDFUNDS main effects.

mechanism_narrative: When GDPC1 posts positive quarter-over-quarter growth, broad real demand expansion raises expected corporate cash flows and produces positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if positive GDPC1 quarter-over-quarter growth is not associated with higher 60-day SPX returns than negative or flat GDPC1 growth, or if the sign is unstable across two consecutive expansions.
